steps.title: Identify the dual requirement
steps.content: The prompt says the student wants to provide both an explanation of what Sonic Meditations is and a concrete example of one meditation. The correct choice must accomplish both goals.

steps.title: Test each choice for explanation and example
steps.content:
• Choice A — 'Sonic Meditations is not music but rather a series of sound-based meditations...': opens with an explanation of what the work is, then pairs it with a specific example from Meditation XVIII. Both requirements met. ✓
  • Choice B — 'In 1971, Oliveros created Sonic Meditations, a series of meditations...': describes what the work is but gives no specific example of any single meditation. ✗
  • Choice C — "Walk so silently that the bottoms of your feet become ears"...': provides an example from Meditation V but never explains what Sonic Meditations is. ✗
  • Choice D — 'While both meditations consist of instructions, Meditation XVIII instructs...': compares two meditations but does not explain what Sonic Meditations is as a concept. ✗
That matches choice A — A is correct.
